2.2.0.description: Dialogs no longer close when the menu that opened them unmounts — open state is now stored in the URL

2.1.0.description: Navigation between views — a dedicated Settings page is on its way
Live tabs now use smarter data fetching — faster updates and no unnecessary re-renders

2.0.0.description: Collections are now persisted in chrome.storage.local — data syncs across all extension tabs automatically
Rewrote drag and drop with dnd-kit — smoother interactions, better keyboard accessibility
Settings now sync across tabs in real time via BroadcastChannel
Automatic data migration from previous versions — your collections carry over seamlessly
Upgraded to React 19, Vite 8 and Tailwind CSS 4

1.5.0.description: Cards counter in the collection item
Using SVG Icons instead emojis for language flags
Fix text colors and backgrounds for lighter collections

1.4.2.description: Double click on the collection to expand/collapse

1.4.0.description: Add background colors to exported collections
New icon for the "Save session to collection" action

1.3.2.description: Improve scrollbar styles on Windows browsers

1.3.0.description: Support for multiple languages, including EN, ES, FR, DE, KO, JA and much more.

1.2.1.description: Fix color selection for unsoported color. Transparent by default

1.2.0.description: Choose a background color for your collections
